content.text:
All 7 active tests pass, including the blinker oscillation test. No code changes were needed in the Green phase because the existing implementation already correctly handles the vertical-to-horizontal blinker oscillation.

The implementation properly handles:
- Cells with negative coordinates (the result includes `[-1, 1]`)
- Survival rule (the center cell `[0, 1]` has 2 live neighbors and survives)
- Reproduction rule (dead cells `[-1, 1]` and `[1, 1]` each have exactly 3 live neighbors and come alive)
- Death rule (the end cells `[0, 0]` and `[0, 2]` each have only 1 neighbor and die)

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes required - existing generic Game of Life implementation handles oscillation correctly
- Result: All tests now pass (7 passing, 2 todo)
- Approach: Minimal - the previous Refactor phase produced a generic algorithm that naturally satisfies this test case without modification

Relevant file:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-14_18-23-58_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts
